{
  "status": "ok",
  "answer": "To relieve nipple soreness and discomfort during breastfeeding, try applying warm compresses or taking a warm shower to help the milk let down. You can also express some milk before feeding, use an anti-inflammatory such as ibuprofen (as directed by your healthcare provider) to reduce swelling, and wear a supportive bra. If you continue to experience discomfort, seek help from your healthcare provider, lactation consultant, or attend a lactation support group.",
